title: coreopsis diversifolia
intro: Coreopsis diversifolia, also known as Tickseed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties have been utilized for centuries, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds, cuts, and minor injuries. The health benefits of Coreopsis diversifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate menstrual cramps, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to promote healing, reduce pain, and calm irritated skin.
